name: Courts Plus Jacksonville
description: Courts Plus Jacksonville is a place to play pickleball in Jacksonville, NC. There are 2 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A membership is required to play.

name: Jack Amyette Recreation Center Gym
description: Jack Amyette Recreation Center Gym is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Jacksonville, NC. There are 3 indoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Players have access to restrooms and water. A membership is required to play.

name: Jacksonville Indoor Recreation Center
description:
Do you hate showing up waiting in a long line to play pickleball? Do you want to show up and play with your friends at a scheduled time? 

Then this is the place for you!  You pay per court for reservations. Have a group of 4 or more and want to rent the whole court, then just select the day and time and you are set! We have two courts available with plenty of space to play on and off the court.

Indoor courts open by reservation or open play when scheduled.

name: Kerr St Recreation Center Tennis Courts
description: There are 4 pickle ball permanent lines.  Two portable pickle ball nets.

name: North Topsail Beach Town Park
description:
Pay to park
Free parking across the street

name: Onslow County Recreation Park
description: Come play pickleball at Onslow County Recreation Park in Jacksonville, NC! There are 4 outdoor hard courts. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. The facility includes amenities like restrooms and water. The courts are free.

name: Stump Sound Park
description: Come play pickleball at Stump Sound Park in Sneads Ferry, NC! There are 2 outdoor hard courts. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. The facility includes amenities like restrooms and lights. The courts are free.

name: Swansboro Recreation Center and Municipal Park
description: Swansboro Recreation Center and Municipal Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Swansboro, NC. There are 6 outdoor asphalt courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The courts are free. Players have access to restrooms and water.

name: Topsail Island
description: Topsail Island is a place to play pickleball in North Topsail Beach, NC. There is 1 outdoor court. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The court is free.

name: Western Park
description: Western Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Swansboro, NC. There are 4 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Amenities include restrooms and water. The courts are free.
